title: Market Intelligence Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger market intelligence foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Market Intelligence Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Market Intelligence Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good market intelligence foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Market Intelligence Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
